description: the SPC oracle drill (P0.5 acceptance): the drift alarm must FIRE on a seeded regression AND stay SILENT on a benign series - both poles or the drill fails
rules: runs vars-free on the bundled fixtures (SEEDED/BENIGN/ENVELOPE override for a custom drill)
exit 0 iff the seeded series alarms and the benign series stays clean
usage: Claim with no vars for the bundled drill. Optional SEEDED/BENIGN/ENVELOPE/SIGMA_K. Output: drilldrift.json.
limitation: Proves the alarm discriminates on the drill corpus; it does not calibrate real detector envelopes.
